case_title: BAROUCH, CHUD VS GOLDEN GATE CYCLE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $395.00 FILED BY BAROUCH, CHUD AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE CYCLE LIMITED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAROUCH, CHUD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE CYCLE LIMITED $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
